channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DSE Week 21 2026: Turnover Rises 32% as MKCB Leads Gains; Foreign Investors Remain Net Sellers
item.description: The Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange (DSE) closed Week 21 of 2026 with strong trading activity, recording a significant increase in equity turnover and overall market participation. Total equity turnover ...

item.title: Australia’s political dispute over trust taxation reforms and whether they amount to a ‘death tax’
item.description: A renewed political debate has emerged in Australia over whether proposed changes to trust taxation could be interpreted as a form of ‘death tax’. While Australia formally abolished inheritance taxes ...

item.title: CCTV footage shows suspected abduction of 2-year-old girl in Kahawa Wendani, Nairobi
item.description: A family in Kahawa Wendani, Nairobi County, is in distress after their two-year-old daughter, Linsey Nyakinyua, went missing on Thursday, May 21, in the afternoon. According to reports, the child was ...

item.title: Five years later, investigations into potential unmarked graves at former residential schools remain largely unverified
item.description: The article reviews developments five years after the Tk’emlups te Secwépemc First Nation announced in May 2021 that ground-penetrating radar (GPR) had identified what were initially described as the ...

item.title: Comelec considers coordination with Ombudsman over P75-million donation linked to Marcoleta campaign disclosures
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) is considering coordinating with the Office of the Ombudsman regarding a controversial P75-million donation received by then senatorial candidate Rodante Marcolet...

item.title: Embracing the benefits of a small kitchen and making compact cooking spaces work
item.description: This opinion piece reflects on the unexpected advantages of living with a small kitchen and how limited space can positively shape everyday cooking habits. The author describes a long history of livin...

item.title: Parliament defends impeachment process integrity amid concerns over Speaker’s conduct and ConCourt ruling implementation
item.description: National Assembly Speaker Thoko Didiza has reassured the public that Parliament is continuing to fulfil its constitutional obligations properly, despite growing political tensions linked to an impeach...

item.title: CTD operation in Quetta kills nine terrorists; four personnel martyred in exchange of fire

item.title: Shell Nigeria Gas hosts industry forum to drive natural gas adoption in the Niger Delta
item.description: Shell Nigeria Gas (SNG) has intensified its push to expand natural gas usage among industries in Nigeria as part of efforts to reduce production costs and support cleaner energy transition. The compan...

item.title: Frank Hayden, Researcher Who Helped Build the Foundation of the Special Olympics, Dies at 96
item.description: Frank Hayden, a Canadian researcher and educator whose work helped inspire the creation of the Special Olympics movement, has died at the age of 96. Hayden devoted much of his career to studying the r...

item.title: Tinubu secures 4,996 votes in Lagos ward APC presidential primary
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has recorded a strong win in the All Progressives Congress (APC) presidential primary held at Ward L2 in Eti-Osa Local Government Area of Lagos State. The exercise took place at ...

item.title: Opinion writer argues Trump should face accountability for January 6 and related legal controversies
item.description: This opinion article by Tara Dublin reflects on the January 6, 2021 attack on the U.S. Capitol and criticizes former President Donald Trump and his supporters. Written in a satirical legal-style forma...

item.title: Nairobi startup develops AI robot translating speech into sign language in real time
item.description: A Nairobi-based assistive technology startup, Zerobionic, has developed an AI-powered robotic system designed to translate spoken language into sign language in real time, aiming to improve learning a...

item.title: Tanzania export earnings rise to 26.3 trillion/- driven by stronger global trade performance
item.description: Tanzania’s export sector has recorded strong growth, reaching 26.3 trillion Tanzanian shillings over the past year, supported by improved business conditions, expanded international market access, and...

item.title: Kenyan immigrant identified after vehicle plunges into North Thompson River in Kamloops
item.description: A 24-year-old woman who is presumed to have drowned after a vehicle entered the North Thompson River in Kamloops, British Columbia, has been identified by a friend as Benina Jepkoech, a Kenyan immigra...

item.title: Columnist cautions Spencer Pratt about the realities of running for Los Angeles mayor
item.description: In this opinion column, Los Angeles Times writer Steve Lopez addresses reality TV personality and mayoral candidate Spencer Pratt, urging him to reconsider his ambitions or at least better understand ...

item.title: Pakistan Army Chief Asim Munir’s Iran Visit Advances Dialogue on Regional De-escalation

item.title: Major power outage disrupts State House, Abuja airport and key institutions in FCT
